name: Marinade for Meat & Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Dry sherry, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Use the marinade on meat and vegetables.
Makes 3/4 cups.
VARIATIONS
Add 1 teaspoon fresh grated ginger root,
1/2 to 1 teaspoon fresh minced garlic,
1/2 to 1 teaspoon grated orange rind,
1/2 teaspoon Dijon style no-salt added mustard,
1/4 teaspoon sesame oil or
1/4 teaspoon hot chili oil.
To thicken the marinade for gravy, combine 1 teaspoon cornstarch or arrowroot and 2 tablespoons cold water. Mix the marinade and cornstarch mixture in a small saucepan and heat until bubbly.
